content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the Neuman Brain project. I've reviewed the constitution and understand my role as lead autonomous engineer/architect.

Let me start by following the session protocol:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main 2>&1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git merge origin/main --no-edit 2>&1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git log -3 --oneline</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && ls tasks/*.md 2>&1 | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Now I'm ready. Based on the environment context:
- **Today's date:** 2025-11-28
- **Current branch:** main (clean status)
- **Recent work:** Deep feature interaction testing (Phases 2, 3, 5, 10 completed), Graph View task archived

I see we have active task files. What would you like to work on today?
